mods.name: Cold Air Intake
mods.description: A performance intake for the EJ257 boxer turbo engine improves turbo spool sound and airflow. The iconic Subaru boxer rumble becomes more pronounced.
mods.installNotes: Remove stock airbox. Install new intake tube and filter. Route into the fender well for cooler air. Requires Cobb AccessPort tune for COBB intake. 20 minutes.

mods.name: Catback Exhaust
mods.description: Unleash the boxer rumble with a turbo-back or catback exhaust. The unequal-length headers give Subarus their distinctive sound.
mods.partNumbers: Invidia Q300 HS02STIG3S, Tomei Expreme Ti 440016
mods.installNotes: Bolt-on from the downpipe flange back. Single or dual exit options. No cutting required. 45 minutes on jack stands. Pairs well with a catless downpipe.

mods.name: Up-Pipe and Downpipe
mods.description: Replace the factory catted up-pipe and restrictive downpipe for dramatically improved exhaust flow and turbo response.
mods.partNumbers: Invidia Catless Downpipe, COBB Catted Downpipe 512101
mods.installNotes: The up-pipe connects the headers to the turbo — the factory unit has a catalytic converter that restricts flow. Remove both up-pipe and downpipe for full benefit. Retune required. 3+ hours.

mods.name: Cobb AccessPort Tune
mods.description: The AccessPort is the gold standard for Subaru tuning. Stage 1 adds 30–40hp on 93 octane. Stage 2 with downpipe adds even more.
mods.partNumbers: COBB AccessPort V3 AP3-SUB-004, COBB Stage 2 map
mods.installNotes: Flash via OBD-II port. Start with Stage 1 on 93 octane. Stage 2 requires catless or catted downpipe. Custom protune strongly recommended over OTS maps for EJ257 reliability. Log DAM and knock.

mods.name: Top-Mount Intercooler Upgrade
mods.description: Replace the undersized factory TMIC with a larger unit for significantly lower intake temps. The stock TMIC heat soaks extremely quickly.
mods.installNotes: Unbolt factory TMIC from the turbo outlet. New unit uses factory mounting points but may require slightly modified charge pipe routing. Recalibrate tune after install. 1–2 hours.

mods.name: Coilover Suspension
mods.description: Adjustable coilovers transform the GD STI's handling with precise ride height and damping control for street or rally-style driving.
mods.partNumbers: KW V3 35245001, Fortune Auto 500 Series GD
mods.installNotes: Full strut replacement at all corners. Set ride height 20mm below stock for street. The GD platform responds well to stiff front / compliant rear spring rate bias. Full alignment required.

mods.name: Upgraded Turbo (VF39/VF43 Swap)
mods.description: Swap the stock VF39 turbo for a larger unit like the VF43 or aftermarket hybrid for higher power potential on the EJ257.
mods.installNotes: Remove factory turbo from exhaust manifold. Bolt-on replacement uses stock up-pipe and oil/coolant lines. Requires larger injectors (1000cc+), fuel pump upgrade, and custom tune. 8+ hours.

mods.name: Built EJ257 Short Block
mods.description: The EJ257 is known for ringland failure at higher power levels. A built short block with forged internals makes the engine reliable to 500+ hp.
mods.partNumbers: IAG Stage 2.5 Closed Deck Short Block, Manley pistons 632100C-4
mods.installNotes: Full engine-out rebuild. Remove, disassemble, machine block (closed deck preferred), install forged pistons, rods, bearings. New gaskets, timing belt, and seals throughout. 40+ hours. Custom tune mandatory.
